original_image_tags: Black-and-white infrared sensor still. The image features a central white crosshair reticle with a vertical scale and a horizontal scale marked with numbers 5, 10, and 15 on either side of the center. A small, dark, roughly rectangular or pill-shaped object is visible just above the horizontal axis and to the right of the vertical axis, between the 0 and 5 marks. The background is a grainy, uniform gray. The top edge of the image has a thick black bar. Multiple black redaction blocks are placed in all four corners of the image, obscuring potential overlay data. A timestamp in white text is visible in the lower-left corner.

elements.description: A grayscale image, likely a photograph or video still, featuring a central crosshair overlay with tick marks and numerical labels (15, 10, 5, 0, 5, 10, 15) along the horizontal axis. A single, small, dark, irregularly shaped object is visible just to the right of the vertical crosshair line and above the horizontal axis. Six black rectangular redaction blocks are arranged symmetrically (three on the left, three on the right). A white timestamp reading '12/31/99 18:18:58' is visible in the bottom-left corner.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (crosshair reticle, dark object, redaction blocks, timestamp) but disagree on the number of redaction blocks (four corners vs. six symmetric blocks), which is a minor numerical inconsistency rather than a direct contradiction on a specific quoted text.
